JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER IRENE BURNS. MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-13-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 606, JOHN CONWAY. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT., SENT FOR PROVE-UP.

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-13-2002 IN DEPT. 606 - MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY THE COURT. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PARTIES THIS DATE. JUDGE JOHN CONWAY, CLERK KAY PEEK, REPORTER JANET POND (606)
